topic: My Ring doorbell logs motion every night at three seventeen AM and the recording shows an empty porch
title: My Doorbell Logs Motion Every Night at 3:17 AM. The Porch Is Empty. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My Ring doorbell logs motion every night at three seventeen. The recording shows an empty porch.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a black Ring doorbell mounted on a beige stucco doorframe at night, the small LED light glowing white, dim porch light overhead, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Two story house in suburban Pennsylvania. Front porch. Two cameras. No pets.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a small suburban two story home at dusk, a covered front porch with a single overhead light, no figures, no animals, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a darkened upstairs bedroom window from the street at night, curtains drawn, the porch light still on below, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Notification at three seventeen. I opened the app and watched the clip.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a smartphone screen showing the Ring app with a motion event timestamp at three seventeen AM, the bedroom around it in deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a smartphone screen showing a Ring camera live view of a porch at night, empty welcome mat visible, no figures in frame, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Motion zone fully triggered. Front step. Front rail. Nothing visible.
scenes.image_prompt: wide overhead view of a residential front porch at night seen through a fisheye doorbell camera lens, motion detection overlay zones drawn in red, no figures, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a laptop screen showing a list of Ring motion events with identical three seventeen AM timestamps repeating down the page, dim home office, vertical 9:16 framing
close detail of a wall clock face in a dim hallway showing three seventeen AM, the hands frozen at the exact minute, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Bought a second camera. Pointed it at the doorbell itself.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a small white security camera mounted on a porch ceiling angled directly at a doorbell unit, dim porch light, no figures, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The new camera at three seventeen shows the doorbell flashing. Nothing in front of it.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a Ring doorbell unit on a doorframe at night with its white LED illuminated mid trigger, the porch in front of it empty, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I unplugged the doorbell at the breaker.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand at a residential electrical breaker panel switching off a labeled doorbell circuit, only the hand visible, dim basement light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The Ring app still logs motion at three seventeen.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a smartphone screen at three seventeen AM showing a new Ring motion notification, the room around it pitch dark, vertical 9:16 framing
